/usr/bin/ar qc liblaplace_fem_core.a CMakeFiles/laplace_fem_core.dir/src/ProblemData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/laplace_fem_core.dir/src/MeshGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/laplace_fem_core.dir/src/TriangleQuadrature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/laplace_fem_core.dir/src/TriangleElement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/laplace_fem_core.dir/src/Assembler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/laplace_fem_core.dir/src/LinearSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/laplace_fem_core.dir/src/PostProcessor.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblaplace_fem_core.a
